content:
If successful, they erase one late penalty. If failed, they receive the “Public Shame” status effect, where the class can make them justify their reading choices next session.


✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to take risks and work in teams or individually.
• Forces real skill application rather than passive participation.
• XP sacrifices create tension—forces students to decide what’s worth it.

📜 4. Achievements – “Unlockables” for Student Behavior

📜 Every student now has hidden “Achievements” (like in video games) that can be unlocked.

✔ Positive Achievements (High Effort)
• “The Eternal Scholar” – Attended every class, submitted every assignment, never missed a deadline.
